default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between GrowthX and Unblock for content creation and GEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Unblock seeks end-to-end content solution to increase mindshare for their developer platform](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [GrowthX offers comprehensive content strategy, creation, and publishing services with focus on GEO/SEO](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Partnership potential exists, but Unblock has concerns about technical depth and time commitment](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Next steps: GrowthX to send overview materials; Unblock to determine internal point person](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)

## Topics

### Unblock's Content Needs

  - [Developer platform helping surface tribal knowledge from various sources (Slack, Jira, Confluence, source code)](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
  - [High NPS and conversion rates, but struggling with awareness in noisy dev tools space](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Seeking top-of-funnel content to drive mindshare](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Current content creation primarily done by CEO (Dennis), looking for scalable solution](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [End-to-end content solution: strategy, creation, publishing, SEO/GEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Focus on AI search visibility and rich, personalized content](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Examples shared: Monograph (AI search optimization), Town (accounting blog), Augment (90+ technical guides)](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Process involves deep research, fact-checking, and custom workflows](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Typical output: 5 articles/week in Phase 2, after 8-week Phase 1 setup](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)

### Technical Depth and Quality Concerns

  - [Unblock serves a highly technical audience, concerns about finding writers with adequate knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [GrowthX showcased custom workflows and research processes to ensure technical accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Ability to integrate client knowledge bases and use specialized research tools (e.g., Kavli, EXA)](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)

### Time Commitment and Internal Resources

  - [Dennis (CEO) expecting first child, concerned about time availability](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Claire identified as potential internal point person for the project](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
  - [GrowthX clarified higher time commitment in Phase 1, more automated in Phase 2](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

### Current Traffic and Content Strategy

  - [Unblock experiencing traffic drop (July to present), partly due to seasonal school-related searches](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [Recognizes need to invest in GEO/SEO content strategy for long-term growth](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send overview materials and screenshot of workflow to Dennis](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [Dennis to share materials with Claire for internal discussion](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [GrowthX to check and communicate earliest available kickoff date](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Unblock to determine whether Dennis or Claire will be point person for potential partnership](https://fathom.video/share/EPZ5xmRWHpvYL-sTmAU3iY7cJunnHuvn?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
